---
name: Feature gap
about: Report something the linter can't do today - a capability the engine is missing.
title: "<short description>"
labels: ["feature-gap"]
---

<!--
A feature gap is a capability the linter cannot express or inspect today - for example,
a policy shape it doesn't model, an output format it doesn't support, or a CLI option it
lacks.

If instead you want the linter to flag a specific pattern in a policy, that's a new rule
- use the Linter rule suggestion template instead.
-->

**What can't the linter do today?**
<!-- Describe the missing capability. -->

**Use case**
<!-- What are you trying to accomplish, and why does the gap block you? -->

**Example**
<!-- A policy snippet, command, or output that illustrates the gap. Optional. -->
```json

```

**Proposed behavior**
<!-- What you'd like the linter to do instead. Optional. -->
